content:
I wanted to write derive macros for FromBytes and AsBytes like the ones we already have for Zeroable. However, I ran into some questions:

  • I guess I have to duplicate the macro helpers in pin-init/internal? I want to use them for my macro too.
  • What should I do with the license ... ?
Don't we already have a patch series adding those? Or am I confusing it with another change?
Maybe I'm confusing things, since I didn't find anything on a quick glance
Feel free to use the pin-init code, we can talk about deduplicating it later
I think we only have it for Zeroable
Ah I confused it with this one: https://lore.kernel.org/all/cover.1755235180.git.y.j3ms.n@gmail.com
